markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX for scaling Teleport's content and SEO/GEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** Teleport needs to scale content production and analytics to expand its audience from engineers to the C-suite (CSO, CTO), targeting efficiency, risk mitigation, and audit stories.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX proposes a "content factory" model using AI workflows and human editors to produce high-quality, technical content at scale, with a focus on shaping AI search (GEO) results.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [**Process:** A $30k–$40k strategy sprint defines the content roadmap. This is followed by a $15k/month execution phase, targeting 5 articles/month, with a flexible opt-out option.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
  - [**Fit:** The model directly addresses Teleport's key pain points: slow content production and unreliable analytics for measuring GEO impact.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)

## Topics

### Teleport's Content Challenges & Goals

  - [**Primary Goal:** Expand audience reach from core engineering/security personas to the C-suite.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
      - [**Why:** To tell stories about Teleport's value in efficiency, risk mitigation, and audit advantages.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [**Key Pain Points (per Travis):**](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
      - [**Production Bottleneck:** Content creation is slow due to extensive writing, editing, and review cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
      - [**Unreliable Analytics:** Current tools (e.g., Semrush's AI plugin) are insufficient for measuring GEO impact and proving ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [**Current Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [**High-Performing:** Competitive "takeout" pages and product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [**Developing:** Teleport Academy (a glossary and resource hub).](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
      - [**Underutilized:** The blog, which has focused on earned media and LinkedIn posts.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [**Future Direction:** A multi-channel "atomized content" strategy (video, social) to maximize content reuse.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)

### GrowthX's "Content Factory" Model

  - [**Core Approach:** Build scalable content "factories" using AI workflows and human editors, rather than just staffing writers.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [**Strategy Sprint (Phase 1):**](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
      - [**Cost:** $30k–$40k (based on company stage).](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
      - [**Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
          - [**Artifacts:** Detailed personas, brand voice guides, and a knowledge base to provide context for AI.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
          - [**Analysis:** Keyword research (volume, difficulty, intent) and competitor analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
          - [**Roadmap:** A topic cluster map and content plan.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [**Execution Phase (Phase 2):**](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
      - [**Cost:** $15k/month for one workstream (e.g., editorial, programmatic).](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
      - [**Target:** 5 articles/month, with a goal of daily publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
      - [**Process:** AI-driven workflows (research, outline, draft) with human editors at every step to ensure accuracy, especially for technical content.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
      - [**Opt-Out:** Teleport can cancel after the strategy sprint if the quality or fit isn't right.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2078.0)

### Analytics & Content Structure

  - [**Performance Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
      - [GrowthX builds custom Looker dashboards to ingest data from Search Console, Amplitude, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
      - [**Goal:** Use performance signals to iterate on the content machine and improve results.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [**Content Structure Recommendations:**](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)
      - [GrowthX advises separating content types to maintain brand trust.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)
      - [**Blog:** Reserved for high-tier thought leadership and company announcements.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)
      - [**Resource Hub:** A `/learn` or `/resources` path for SEO-focused guides and how-tos.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)
      - [**Why:** To prevent top-of-funnel content from diluting the blog's authority with a C-suite audience.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Travis/Doug:** Send 2–5 examples of desired content to GrowthX to confirm fit.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)
  - [**Tyler:** Send resources and a booking link for a follow-up call.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2399.0)
  - [**Next Call:** Review the proposal, address questions, and discuss a potential Q1 2025 partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/vMsuBo3cPamomSKSQTxzqyy4xdSfbGxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2399.0)
